quotes.text: I'm a friend first, boss second, and probably an entertainer third.
A great manager doesn't make decisions; the best manager makes decisions that seem like they weren't made.
I'm not superstitious, but I am a little stitious.
Whenever I'm about to do something, I think 'Would an idiot do that?' And if they would, I do not do that thing.
I run away from my problems, and it works.
The key to a great manager is not to do the work yourself, even though I have a lot of it.
I don't think I'm a bad manager. Because I don't think I'm managing people. I think I'm leading them.
You took me for granted.
Sometimes I'll start a sentence and I don't even know where it's going. I hope I find it along the way.
My philosophy is basically this, and this is something that I live by, and I always have, and I always will: Don't ever, for any reason, do anything, to anyone, for any reason, ever, no matter what.
I would rather feel bad man. That's all that matters to me is that you're happy.
If I had a gun with two bullets and I was in a room with Hitler, Bin Laden, and Toby, I would shoot Toby twice.
Fool me once, strike one. But fool me twice... strike three.
I'm not a perfectionist, but I do care.
Be the person your dog thinks you are.
I'm an early bird and I'm a night owl, so I'm essentially a 24-hour bird.
Treat every day like it's your last, and eventually you'll be right.
I think that the fact that I get along with these people means that we are friends.
I'm running away from my responsibilities. And it's awesome.
I'm not offended by homosexuality. In the '80s I made out with a man. It was awesome.
Umm, you know what? I'm going to do what's best for the company and for the people that work here.
I wish there was a way to know you're in the good old days before you've actually left them.
I'm an idiot. But I'm an idiot that makes an effort.
The worst thing about prison was the Dementors.
I am Beyoncé, always.
I love inside jokes. I'd love to be part of one someday.
I declare bankruptcy!
I'm not great at the advice. Can I interest you in a sarcastic comment?
You can't just say you declare bankruptcy. You have to say 'I declare bankruptcy.'
When I was in business, I had to learn how to manage my time.
Everywhere I go, I find that people want to be around me. That's just what happens.
I'm not a bad person. I'm not a bad manager.
This is what I love about these people. No matter what, they show up and do their job.
The best time to wear a striped sweater is all the time.
I need to work on being a better manager. I think I am.
I gave my blood, sweat and tears to that company. Literally.
All I know is my gut tells me maybe.
I would rather work for someone who worked for me.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Do I need to be liked? Absolutely not. I like to be liked. I enjoy being liked.
I have been Michael Scott for a long time. Like, as long as I can remember.
I should have been a priest. I have such a good relationship with God.
I can't talk to you without being in my underwear. It's a new management style.
I want people to be afraid of how much they love me.
That's what she said.
I'm going to go have a cigarette, right now. It's only my second one today.
We're not dating. We're just friends who happen to be in love.
I'm not superstitious, I'm just a little stitious. And I will not be undermined by employees.
Everything I have, I owe to this job. This job is my life.
The most important thing is the mission: to make the client happy. So I make myself happy first.
I wish I could go back in time and change that decision.
I have too much on my plate. But that's what makes me a good manager—I delegate most of it.
Crying is not a sign of weakness. It's a sign of passion and dementia.
I'm like an athlete. Except I'm not.
I'm going to tell you why I like your proposal. It's because you addressed me as the decision-maker.
The worst day of your life so far.
I'm not going to be ignored, Dan. Wait, wrong reference. Michael Scott is not going to be ignored.
I'm not a hero. I'm a normal person that does extraordinary things.
Sometimes you need to take a step back and remind yourself of what's important.
I would never fire someone. Unless they deserved it.
It's not about the money. But also, it's always about the money.
I'm not going to let corporate culture destroy the heart of my office.
I don't think I can do anything wrong. Because I do everything with good intentions.
I put my whole heart and soul into Dunder Mifflin. That's what managers do.
I'm running away to Costa Rica. I'm going to be one of those guys with a big beard.
That's what I love about this place. People listen to me.
I would never poison someone. Even if I could.
I have decided that I'm going to be positive about things.
The best managers are like basketball coaches. And I'm like Michael Jordan.
I'm going to make the biggest decision of my life based on a coin flip.
Business ethics are a thing of the past. I'm talking about business love.
I don't care if you like me. Just do your job and like Dunder Mifflin.
I'm the World's Best Boss. It says so on my mug.
I don't tell jokes. I tell stories.
The key to working out is consistency. And I am nothing if not consistent.
I learned that you can't just treat people like commodities.
I don't have a lot of close friends. But the people in this office are my best friends.
Never go with your gut. Gut's stupid.
I'm ready to take on the world. And by the world, I mean Dunder Mifflin.
This is a dream that I have had since lunch, and I am not giving up on it now.
This is not Michael Scott talking right now, this is your future. Hello, I am your future. You're older, and you are very happy now. Because you went with Michael Scott.
Are you, are you doing your best here? Are you being the best that you can be?
I've got nothing got lose.
I cannot promise success, but I will promise you the best effing time of your life!!!

When I was seven, my mother hired a pony and a cart to come to my house for all the kids. And I got a really bad rash. From the pony. Had to go inside, and my mother was rubbing cream on me, for probably three hours, and I never came outside.

I fell in love with these kids. And I didn't want to see them fall victim to the system. So I made 'em a promise. I told them if they graduated from high school, I would pay for their college education.
An office is a place where dreams come true. To the max.
That's what she said.

personal_habits.text: I enjoy having breakfast in bed. I like waking up to the smell of bacon. Sue me. And since I don't have a butler, I have to do it myself. So, most nights before I go to bed, I will lay six strips of bacon out on my George Foreman grill. Then I go to sleep. When I wake up, I plug in the grill. I go back to sleep again. Then I wake up to the smell of crackling bacon. It is delicious. It's good for me. It's a perfect way to start the day.
How does one just sit down and work? You have to ease into it.
I don't know what it is, but something about me being here is just stressing everybody out.
I spent the afternoon in the park trying to feed the pigeons. I guess they all flew west for the winter. And I just had some thoughts that I wanted to share with you people.
Any man who says he totally understands women is a fool.
Hi, I'm Date Mike. Nice to meet me. How do you like your eggs in the morning?
Games have the power to distract people from stressful situations.
I'm sinking a few, you know. Swish, swish, swish. Nothing but net. And their jaws just dropped to the floor.
Do I need to be liked? Absolutely not. I like to be liked. I enjoy being liked. I have to be liked, but it's not like this compulsive need to be liked... like my need to be praised.
I have a habit of standing directly underneath icicles and staring up at them. I like the way they look from standing directly underneath them.
About 40 times a year, Michael gets sick but has no symptoms. Dwight is always gravely concerned.
I ran away from my problems. And it works.
I'm running away from my responsibilities. And it's awesome.
Sometimes I'll start a sentence and I don't even know where it's going. I just hope I find it along the way.
I really don't know what the hell I'm doing. I sometimes put on a good show, and I sometimes don't even quite do that, but I'm just rambling along trying to figure it out as I go along.

Reverse psychology is an awesome tool. I don't know if you guys know about it, but, basically, you make someone think the opposite of what you believe. And that tricks them into doing something stupid. Works like a charm.
When I was in business, I had to learn how to manage my time.
I wrote them down so I wouldn't forget.
I forgot that Kevin has been eating all the food. So I have to order more.
I want people to be afraid of how much they love me.

Games have the power to distract people from stressful situations. Battleship got me through my parents' divorce. Operation got me through my vasectomy, i.e., my operation. I don't think I would have been able to endure my breakup with Holly had it not been for Toss Across.
They need this game, Jim! Let us have this stupid little game, alright!?

If you're a family stuck on a lifeboat in the middle of the ocean, one parent might want to just keep rowing. But if the other parent wants to play a game, it's not because they're crazy. It's because they're doing it for the kids.

ideas_and_inventions.text: I have an idea for a fancy men's shoe store called Shoe La La. And it's just men's shoes for the special occasions in a man's life, like the day that you get married or the day your wife has a baby, or for just lounging around the house.
It's a net, a circular net you put inside the toilet to catch all of your change and your wallet from falling into the toilet. Formerly known as Toilet Guard.
Toilet Sponge. It's a hollowed out sponge that is more absorbent and softer than toilet paper. I have a lot of toilet ideas.
A Magic No Ouchie Meat Machine — a foot-safe version of the George Foreman Grill. It's a grill inside a bunny cage.
I mix Newman's Ranch with Newman's Italian. I sell it at flea markets for a slight loss. It's called Great Scott!
Tube City — a system of interconnected tubes running through the office with hamsters inside them.
Mike's Cereal Shack — a restaurant that serves every variety of cereal they sell in the store.
Chair Pants — a chair that is part of your pants so when you sit down, you're supported.
A lot of ideas were not appreciated in their time. Electricity. Shampoo.
ideas_and_inventions.idea: Ideas not appreciated in their time

ideas_and_inventions.text: I'm filled with good ideas. Thousands of good ideas.
Everybody has to go to the bathroom. They're not easy ideas.
The Michael Scott Paper Company — my own paper company, founded upon quitting Dunder Mifflin.

management_approaches.name: The Friend Boss
management_approaches.approach: Treats employees like best friends first, manages second. Wants to be loved more than respected.
management_approaches.effectiveness: Sometimes works short-term, creates chaos long-term

management_approaches.name: The Emotional Manager
management_approaches.approach: Makes decisions based on feelings. Cries during meetings. Gets angry, then forgives too quickly.

management_approaches.name: The Improviser
management_approaches.approach: No plan, just feels. Makes up policy on the fly. Contradicts himself constantly.

management_approaches.name: The Delegator (Sort Of)
management_approaches.approach: Gives tasks to people, then immediately takes them back or changes direction halfway through.

management_approaches.name: The Motivator Through Fear
management_approaches.approach: Reminds people he can fire them, then immediately says he'd never do it. Keeps them off-balance.
